batch_summary: Deed [320] — Release of Lien (LC Inst# 07804491, Vol. 630, Pg. 105–106, Doc# 4491). Georgia Nell Ennis, Genevieve Dorsett, and John P. Black release the $12,800 vendor's lien from deed [318] on three John Boyd Survey tracts (~42.8 ac) sold to Roy Simmons and wife Virginia M. Simmons. Promissory note paid in full. Executed May 9, 1978; filed June 12, 1978; recorded June 13, 1978. No conveyance — lien discharge only. Disposed property; no impact on current holdings. Key secondary findings: (1) Underlying deed of trust recorded LC Vol. 94, Pg. 534, Deed of Trust Records — new citation not previously in tracking files. (2) Georgia Nell Ennis residence updated: Comal County by May 1978 (moved from Harris County; preprinted 'HARRIS' struck through on form). (3) Genevieve Dorsett residence narrowed: back in Limestone County by May 1978 (was in Jefferson Co. AL in Jan 1975). (4) JP Black acknowledged as 'JOHN BLACK' before Harry P. Bounds NP, Freestone County (Bounds family member as notary). (5) Transcription metadata volume discrepancy flagged (header says Vol. 94; county index says Vol. 630 — Vol. 94 is the DT Records volume). ISSUE-43 item 13 pulled.

operations.replace_with: she had moved from Dallas County (1959) to Alabama by 1975, returned to Limestone County by May 1978 (deed [320] acknowledgment, Limestone Co. NP), and was in Tehuacana at death (1999).

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deed [320] added to Phase 2 — Release of Lien, Ennis + Dorsett + JP Black release vendor's lien (deed [318]) on Boyd Survey tracts; note paid in full; DISPOSED PROPERTY

operations.description: Add deed [320] entry to Phase 2 section, after deed [318]
operations.content: 8. `1978-05-09_[320]_l` — Georgia Nell Ennis (Comal Co. TX) + Genevieve Dorsett (Limestone Co. TX) + John P. Black (Freestone Co. TX) → Roy Simmons and wife Virginia M. Simmons (release of lien, Limestone) — Release of $12,800 promissory note and vendor's lien from deed [318]; underlying deed of trust: LC Vol. 94, Pg. 534, Deed of Trust Records. Note paid in full; lien on three John Boyd Survey tracts (~42.8 ac) discharged. Property descriptions identical to deed [318]: First Tract 16.8 ac, Second Tract 25 ac, Third Tract ~1 ac less 100×100 ft lot. Lienholders described as "of the Counties of Harris, Freestone, Limestone" (residences at time of form preparation; actual residences at execution differ — see acknowledgments). Acknowledgments: Georgia Nell Ennis acknowledged May 5, 1978 before Denise Dreiss NP, Comal County (form originally read "HARRIS" County — struck through, replaced with "COMAL"); Genevieve Dorsett acknowledged May 9, 1978 before Billy [surname illegible — HUMAN REVIEW flag 1] NP, Limestone County; John P. Black (acknowledged as "JOHN BLACK" — no middle name/initial) acknowledged May 9, 1978 before Harry P. Bounds NP, Freestone County (commission exp. Jun 7, 1978). Note: Harry P. Bounds is a Bounds family member serving as notary — see FC index (A-16 Bounds members). JP Black dies 6 months later (11/14/1978). LC Vol. 630, Pg. 105–106, Inst# 07804491, Doc# 4491. Filed Jun 12, 1978 at 8:00 AM; recorded Jun 13, 1978 at 2:00 PM; Nancy Stockton, Deputy; Dena Pruitt, County Clerk, Limestone County. ⚠️ TRANSCRIPTION METADATA DISCREPANCY: Transcription header states "volume: 94" — this is likely the DT Records volume (the deed of trust is at Vol. 94 Pg. 534 of the Deed of Trust Records), not the deed records volume; county index citation "Vol. 630" is presumed correct. **DISPOSED PROPERTY — companion lien release to deed [318]. No conveyance.** ISSUE-43 item 13.
